title: Cuter Happy Ghasts
description: The cuter look of Happy ghasts
body:
Do you think happy ghasts are not cute enough?
This pack gives them a w-shape mouth like this so that they might look cuter!
![A cuter happy ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af4d4ce94dd6cda53ad2834e60e530e2d49a4813.jpeg)
I know the new texture might looks strange,but I'll try my best to improve it and satisfy everyone.
